message:
feat(ffs-repair): implement RaptorQ encode/decode workflow (bd-12x)

Add codec module bridging asupersync RaptorQ with the FrankenFS block
layer. encode_group() reads source blocks and generates repair symbols
via SystematicEncoder; decode_group() reconstructs corrupt blocks via
InactivationDecoder. 12 tests including fault injection, determinism,
multi-block recovery, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
